title: Cuando las nubes esconden la sombra
original_title: Cuando las nubes esconden la sombra
overview: Maria travels to Puerto Williams to star in a movie. But the film crew won't be able to arrive due to a strong storm. Alone, she'll seek help for severe back pain, which will lead her to discover life in the southernmost city in the world and a pending story in her life.
